examples: I was heartily ashamed of my hastiness.
And I will be on guard against two evils: hastiness and indecision.
We avoid tardiness, and we should also avoid hastiness and anxiety. We do a good job, and the same time, we enjoy a good life.
But experience suggests that opinion makers are often too quick with up-or-down judgments about new ideas, and this hastiness is reflected notably in the history of business innovation.
The rapid growth in sales during the early part of the season has in part been attributed to the hastiness of retailers in offering discounts to attract shoppers.
